sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hashes (id UInt32, original_string String, min_hash UInt64, max_hash UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_hashes VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is a database for OLAP.', wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive('ClickHouse is a database for OLAP.') AS Tuple);
UPDATE test_hashes SET min_hash = wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(original_string) AS Tuple WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_string, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(original_string) AS Tuple FROM test_hashes;
SELECT id, original_string, min_hash, max_hash FROM test_hashes WHERE min_hash = 12884901899;
